rulings.Case Title: LAURA HERMOSILLO VS. STEPHEN WILLIAMS ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 11, 2017, line 1. DEFENDANT STEPHEN WILLIAMS' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED in part and OVERULED in part. Demurrer is OVERRULED as to the cause of action for violation of SFRO 37.10B. This provision of the ordinance prohibits certain acts to be committed by certain people ("No landlord, and no agent, contractor, subcontractor or employee of the landlord") and allows for a civil action to be brought for its violation. The duties and liabilities of each of the persons listed are separate and apart from the liabilities of others, i.e. landlord is prohibited from committing the acts and agent (e.g. property manager) is prohibited from committing the same acts. This independent liability is sufficiently alleged (as distinguished from aiding and abetting or conspiracy, which cannot be asserted without compliance with CC CC 1714.10; Howard v. Sup. Ct. (1992) 2 Cal.App.4th 745). Demurrer for cause of action under CC 52.1 is OVERRULED. Violation of Bane Act is sufficiently alleged. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to the cause of action for trespass to chattels for Plaintiff to allege actual damages suffered by reason of the impairment of the property of the loss of its use. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HSBC BANK USA, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION VS. ESTRELLA REYES DE JESUS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 11, 2017, line 2. DEFENDANT REMEDIOS CAMINONG, ELENA CANITES, JUNA CELLAN's Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint transferred to Department 514 to be heard at 9:30 a.m. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KWOK WAH CHU VS. ABRAHAM MICHAEL ROTH ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery To Establish Admissions From Plaintiff, And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 11, 2017, line 3. DEFENDANT ABRAHAM ROTH's Motion To Compel Discovery To Establish Admissions From Plaintiff, And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff GRANTED. Plaintiff shall provide complete verified responses without objections no later than April 18, 2017 to Request for Production, Form Interrogatories and Special Interrogatories. Admissions are deemed admitted. Plaintiff shall appear for deposition on mutually agreeable date no later than April 26, 2017. If parties are not able to agree on a date Defendant shall serve a Notice of Deposition with a new deposition date per Discovery Act. Sanctions granted in the amount of $875 to be paid within 5 days of notice of entry of order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KWOK WAH CHU VS. ABRAHAM MICHAEL ROTH ET AL

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 11, 2017, line 3. DEFENDANT ABRAHAM ROTH's Motion Re: Continuance Of Trial Date GRANTED. Trial is continued to May 8, 2017; mandatory settlement conference is continued to May 4, 2017. = (501/REQ)
